name: profile-graph
description: claudecode: graph-mode (CUDA graphs ON) decode profiler on the official QAT W4A16 int4 base. Measures true single-stream TPS + GPU-busy-vs-wall overhead + per-category GPU busy time via vLLM's kineto/CUPTI profiler (captures kernels under graph replay). Decision-grade data for whether the weight-GEMM bandwidth floor is the real lever (sub-4-bit kernel) vs scheduler/engine overhead. Full multimodal retained.
